evidence: "A personal favorite of mine in the 80s Slasher genre."
"The LEGO Justice League movies are pure greatness."
"I still have no idea what the movie is about. But as a big action movie it is spectacular to watch."
"There are definitely worse slashers BUT there are way better"
"Some of the stunt work is just amazing. A nice to decompress."
"So bad it was hilarious. I wish there were more episodes."
"The only downside is that it doesn't feature the original Beatrix Potter illustrations."
"The Blu-ray really brings out the color and the singing is pure greatness."
"I like this movie. Yeah there are plot holes as big as the grand canyon."

summary: The user enjoys animated features and 80s slasher films, showing a preference for fast-paced entertainment. They appreciate visual quality but are less concerned with narrative complexity and emotional depth.
